steps.title: Test each point against both inequalities
steps.content: A point is a solution if it satisfies both $y \le x + 15$ and $y \ge -4x - 15$. Substitute each choice's coordinates into both inequalities.

steps.title: Backsolving — checking choice B (0, 16)
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B (0, 16): Check $16 \le 0 + 15 = 15$. False — B is eliminated.
Fails. Testing choice C (0, -16): Check $-16 \le 0 + 15 = 15$ (true). Check $-16 \ge -4(0) - 15 = -15$ (false). C is eliminated.

steps.title: Backsolving — checking choice A (-7, 0)
steps.content:
Fails. Testing choice A (-7, 0): Check $0 \le -7 + 15 = 8$ (true). Check $0 \ge -4(-7) - 15 = 28 - 15 = 13$ (false). A is eliminated.
Fails. Testing choice D (7, 0): Check $0 \le 7 + 15 = 22$ (true). Check $0 \ge -4(7) - 15 = -28 - 15 = -43$ (true). Both inequalities are satisfied. That matches choice D — D is correct.
